title: rubus × malacoxylon
intro: Rubus × malacoxylon is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, known as a black raspberry or a black thimble raspberry, which is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. The medicinal properties of Rubus × malacoxylon include its high antioxidant and anti-inflammatory content, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × malacoxylon include its ability to support heart health, aid in weight management, and protect against certain types of cancer. Rubus × malacoxylon can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, jams, and dried berry powders, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
